name: spool-backup
description: Forced-close save-backup safety net for Spool-managed games.

scripts.deploy: rollup -c && rsync -av dist/ deck@192.168.86.113:/tmp/spool-backup-dist/ && ssh -t deck@192.168.86.113 'sudo rsync -av --delete /tmp/spool-backup-dist/ ~/homebrew/plugins/spool-backup/dist/ && sudo systemctl restart plugin_loader'
scripts.deploy:local: rollup -c && sudo mkdir -p ~/homebrew/plugins/spool-backup && sudo rsync -a --delete dist/ ~/homebrew/plugins/spool-backup/dist/ && sudo cp plugin.json package.json main.py ~/homebrew/plugins/spool-backup/ && sudo chown -R root:root ~/homebrew/plugins/spool-backup && sudo systemctl restart plugin_loader
